# Best AI Tools for Twitter Growth in 2026

Twitter remains one of the most powerful platforms for building your personal brand and connecting with your audience. AI tools help you grow your following while saving time!

Check out our [[link:/category/Productivity|Productivity category]] for more AI tools.

---

## [[link:/tools/23|Rytr]]: Tweet Writing at Scale

[[link:/tools/23|Rytr]] helps you write engaging tweets and threads that get retweets.

### Rytr for Twitter
- **Tweet templates**: Proven formats that perform well
- **Thread writer**: Create viral thread structures
- **Hook generator**: Grab attention in the first line

**Try Rytr Free**: {{AFFILIATE_RYTR}}

---

## [[link:/tools/100|Notion AI]]: Content Planning & Scheduling

[[link:/tools/100|Notion AI]] helps you plan and organize your Twitter content strategy.

### Notion AI for Twitter
- **Content calendar**: Plan your posting schedule
- **Best times**: AI suggests optimal posting times
- **Engagement tracking**: Monitor your performance

**Try Notion AI**: {{AFFILIATE_NOTION}}

---

## Comparison Table

| Tool | Best For | Price | Affiliate |
|------|----------|-------|-----------|
| [[link:/tools/23|Rytr]] | Writing tweets | $9/mo | Yes |
| [[link:/tools/100|Notion AI]] | Planning & scheduling | $8/mo | Yes |
| Grammarly | Editing tweets | $12/mo | Yes |

---

## Our Recommendations

- **Tweet writing**: Start with [[link:/tools/23|Rytr]]
- **Planning**: Use [[link:/tools/100|Notion AI]]
- **Editing**: Add Grammarly
